commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `model: "inherit"` for native `sessions_spawn`, threads requester model context into subagent planning and session persistence, and updates docs, tests, and prompt snapshots.

PR surface: Source +184, Tests +213, Docs +7. Total +404 across 22 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the remaining patch defect by source inspection: model aliases are documented and resolved only after the new `inherit` sentinel guard. A focused unit test with a configured alias named `inherit` should reproduce the compatibility break.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused repair can preserve alias compatibility and add regression coverage without redesigning the feature.

target.title: feat(agents): inherit requester model for subagents
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds `model: "inherit"` support for native sub-agent spawns so child runs can follow the requester session's active model.
- Threads the requester model context from tool creation through `sessions_spawn` into direct sub-agent planning, with a persisted-session fallback when needed.
- Documents the new sub-agent model inheritance behavior and config precedence.
- Out of scope: ACP runtime model inheritance; ACP spawns keep their existing model handling.

Review focus: model-selection precedence, the missing-requester-model error path, and whether docs describe the new behavior clearly.

## Linked context

Closes #

Related #

Was this requested by a maintainer or owner?

No formal maintainer request; this addresses a configuration gap where sessions can use different active models but derived sub-agents could not intentionally follow the requester model.

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

- Behavior or issue addressed: native `sessions_spawn` can now use `model: "inherit"` or sub-agent model config set to `"inherit"` to resolve the child model from the requester session.
- Real environment tested: local macOS OpenClaw checkout at PR head `9a8d70a`, OpenClaw `2026.5.28`; local loopback Gateway started with `OPENCLAW_SKIP_CHANNELS=1`; real provider-backed run on `openai-codex/gpt-5.5` using an OAuth auth profile.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```bash
OPENCLAW_SKIP_CHANNELS=1 node scripts/run-node.mjs gateway run --compact --cli-backend-logs

node scripts/run-node.mjs agent \
  --agent main \
  --session-key agent:main:pr-inherit-proof-20260528-retry-001 \
  --model openai-codex/gpt-5.5 \
  --timeout 900 \
  --json \
  --message 'PR verification run. Do not send any external channel message and do not use the message tool. Use sessions_spawn exactly once with taskName="inherit_model_probe", label="inherit-model-probe", model="inherit", context="isolated", cleanup="keep", runTimeoutSeconds=180, and task="Return exactly CHILD_MODEL_INHERIT_PROBE_OK, then include one short line naming the model/provider you are running under if visible." After spawning, call sessions_yield so the child completion can return to this requester session. When the child result arrives, reply with a concise proof summary including the child taskName, the child result text, and the requester model openai-codex/gpt-5.5.'

node scripts/run-node.mjs sessions --all-agents --active 120 --json
```

- Evidence after fix (terminal capture excerpts, redacted to omit local absolute paths):

```json
{
  "runId": "a31fa843-6e0a-4696-aaa2-e3ccc9ed0f94",
  "status": "ok",
  "summary": "completed",
  "result": {
    "meta": {
      "agentMeta": {
        "provider": "openai-codex",
        "model": "gpt-5.5",
        "agentHarnessId": "codex"
      },
      "executionTrace": {
        "winnerProvider": "openai-codex",
        "winnerModel": "gpt-5.5",
        "fallbackUsed": false
      },
      "toolSummary": {
        "calls": 2,
        "tools": ["sessions_spawn", "sessions_yield"],
        "failures": 0
      }
    }
  }
}
```

```json
{
  "parentToolCall": {
    "name": "sessions_spawn",
    "arguments": {
      "taskName": "inherit_model_probe",
      "label": "inherit-model-probe",
      "model": "inherit",
      "context": "isolated",
      "cleanup": "keep",
      "runTimeoutSeconds": 180
    }
  },
  "spawnResult": {
    "status": "accepted",
    "childSessionKey": "agent:main:subagent:5b710938-44c0-4927-a48e-ac1c0e124189",
    "taskName": "inherit_model_probe",
    "modelApplied": true
  }
}
```

```json
{
  "key": "agent:main:subagent:5b710938-44c0-4927-a48e-ac1c0e124189",
  "kind": "spawn-child",
  "model": "gpt-5.5",
  "modelProvider": "openai-codex",
  "providerOverride": "openai-codex",
  "modelOverride": "gpt-5.5",
  "agentRuntime": {
    "id": "codex",
    "source": "implicit"
  },
  "status": "done"
}
```

```json
{
  "childAssistantMessage": {
    "role": "assistant",
    "provider": "openai-codex",
    "model": "gpt-5.5",
    "content": "CHILD_MODEL_INHERIT_PROBE_OK\nModel/provider visible: Codex based on GPT-5."
  },
  "parentFinalMessage": "Proof summary:\n- Child taskName: `inherit_model_probe`\n- Child result: `CHILD_MODEL_INHERIT_PROBE_OK` / `Model/provider visible: Codex based on GPT-5.`\n- Requester model: `openai-codex/gpt-5.5`"
}
```

- Observed result after fix: the parent session ran on `openai-codex/gpt-5.5`, invoked `sessions_spawn` with `model: "inherit"`, the spawn was accepted with `modelApplied: true`, and the child `spawn-child` session persisted and executed with `modelProvider: "openai-codex"` and `model: "gpt-5.5"`.
- What was not tested: external channel delivery was intentionally disabled with `OPENCLAW_SKIP_CHANNELS=1`; ACP runtime inheritance remains out of scope for this PR.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: proof used a local loopback Gateway and a real model provider run, with channel connectors skipped to avoid external delivery.
- Before evidence (optional but encouraged): existing tests covered concrete model overrides and config defaults but had no requester-model inheritance path.

## Tests and validation

Which commands did you run?

- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 CHANGELOG.md docs/gateway/config-agents.md docs/tools/subagents.md src/agents/model-selection.test.ts src/agents/model-selection.ts src/agents/openclaw-tools.subagents.sessions-spawn.model.test.ts src/agents/openclaw-tools.ts src/agents/subagent-spawn-plan.ts src/agents/subagent-spawn.runtime.ts src/agents/subagent-spawn.test-helpers.ts src/agents/subagent-spawn.test.ts src/agents/subagent-spawn.ts src/agents/tool-description-presets.ts src/agents/tools/sessions-spawn-tool.test.ts src/agents/tools/sessions-spawn-tool.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts src/config/types.agents.ts`
- `node scripts/check-no-conflict-markers.mjs`
- `node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/agents/openclaw-tools.subagents.sessions-spawn.model.test.ts src/agents/model-selection.test.ts src/agents/tools/sessions-spawn-tool.test.ts src/agents/subagent-spawn.test.ts`
- `node scripts/check-changed.mjs` (partial; stopped during `tsgo:core:test` after 969s without output)
- `OPENCLAW_SKIP_CHANNELS=1 node scripts/run-node.mjs gateway run --compact --cli-backend-logs`
- `node scripts/run-node.mjs agent --agent main --session-key agent:main:pr-inherit-proof-20260528-retry-001 --model openai-codex/gpt-5.5 --timeout 900 --json --message '<sessions_spawn model="inherit" proof prompt>'`
- `node scripts/run-node.mjs sessions --all-agents --active 120 --json`

What regression coverage was added or updated?

- Model-selection tests for explicit `inherit`, configured `inherit`, alias preservation, and missing requester model behavior.
- `sessions_spawn` tool tests to verify active model provider/id is passed into native sub-agent context.
- Direct sub-agent spawn tests to verify requester model context is persisted on the child session.

What failed before this fix, if known?

Sub-agent spawns could select explicit or configured concrete models, but there was no supported way to make a child follow the requester session's active model.

If no test was added, why not?

N/A.

## Risk checklist

Did user-visible behavior change? (`Yes/No`)

Yes.

Did config, environment, or migration behavior change? (`Yes/No`)

Yes. `agents.defaults.subagents.model` and `agents.list[].subagents.model` now accept `"inherit"` as a special value.

Did security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior change? (`Yes/No`)

No.

What is the highest-risk area?

Model resolution precedence for native sub-agent spawns.

How is that risk mitigated?

The implementation keeps existing concrete model precedence, resolves `"inherit"` only for sub-agent model candidates, errors when inheritance is requested without a requester model, and adds focused tests at the model-selection, tool, direct-spawn, and live Gateway seams.

## Current review state

What is the next action?

Maintainer review after the real behavior proof check re-runs against the updated PR body.

What is still waiting on author, maintainer, CI, or external proof?

The PR body now includes live Gateway proof. Waiting on the automated real behavior proof check to re-run and maintainer review.

Which bot or reviewer comments were addressed?

Addressed the missing live Gateway proof concern by adding real `sessions_spawn model="inherit"` evidence from PR head.
